title: USD Variant Composition Spec Coverage Ledger

normative_source.rule: Only the AOUSD core specification at aousd/specifications-public v1.0.1 is normative for this ledger. This ledger covers only direct selected variant namespace composition.

status_values.implemented: In scope for the variant-namespace-source contract and covered by goldens.
status_values.partial: A bounded subset is included and later contracts must extend it.
status_values.deferred: Specified behavior intentionally not included in this first variant contract.
status_values.out_of_scope: Belongs to another subsystem or future skill.

coverage_rules: The provider composes direct and recursive selected variants and delegates stage traversal to usd-stage-population.
The first provider consumes a base namespace source, not parser-local USDA syntax.
A generated target must not claim external variant fallback maps, references or payloads authored inside selected variants, or full value resolution from this provider.

obligations: Read direct selected variant names from the base source-visible variantSelection field.
Use variantSetNames or variantSetChildren to discover declared variant sets.
Map the selected variant root and descendants onto the owning prim path.
Treat the variantSelection fallback value as an empty map when no selection has been authored.
Local and inherits fields are stronger than selected variant fields.
A base def remains the effective population specifier when the selected variant contributes an over.
Specializes child and property opinions are composed weaker than selected variant opinions, while local and inherits child and property opinions are composed stronger than selected variant opinions.
Place usd-variant-namespace-source after the terminal non-variant namespace-source provider in graph evaluation order.
Require variant composition to compute selections from non-variant opinions before inserting selected variant opinions.
Require selected variant opinions to be inserted at their LIVERPS strength, weaker than inherits and stronger than relocates, references, payloads, and specializes even though evaluated after them.
Do not compose a variant when no selection is authored.
Do not compose a variant when the selected value is an empty string.

spec_refs: aousd/specifications-public@v1.0.1:specification/document_data_model/README.md:100 prim children and variant set specs
obligations: Diagnose a selected variant whose variant set exists but whose selected variant spec is absent.
Include the owning prim path, variant set, selected variant, and expected variant path in diagnostics.
Do not construct a successful namespace source when a direct selected variant cannot be found.
Expose the composed selected variant tree through the namespace-source boundary.
Allow usd-stage-population to populate selected variant prims and properties without evaluating variant selections itself.
Preserve composed child and property ordering when consumed by stage population.
Discover variant sets and variantSelection fields contributed by selected variant specs.
Select nested variants and project their prim/property opinions into composed scene paths.
Order deeper selected variant contributors stronger than shallower selected variant contributors.
Use the variantSelection field fallback value of an empty map to leave unselected sets inert.
Reuse a previously decided selection for a later matching variant set in the current selected-variant branch.
Do not introduce external variant fallback maps or stage/session fallback policies because they are not defined by the AOUSD v1.0.1 core composition text.
items.deferred_reason: Only spec-backed empty-map fallback and previous-selection reuse are covered; external fallback maps remain out of scope.

obligations: Use the final source-visible variantSetNames order, or variantSetChildren when variantSetNames is absent, as selected variant set strength order.
Treat the first selected variant set in that order as stronger than later selected variant sets when their opinions overlap.
Compose child names from weaker selected variant set contributors before stronger selected variant set contributors.
